use_cases: Creating staggered text reveal animations on page load or scroll
Building animated hero headings with blur, shake, scale, fade, or slide effects
Adding interactive typography that animates by word, character, or line
Enhancing landing page sections with motion-enhanced text displays
Creating typewriter-style text effects with configurable delays and triggers
ai_summary: A text animation utility component built with Framer Motion that creates staggered text reveals with multiple preset effects including blur, shake, scale, fade, and slide. Supports animation by word, character, or line segments with configurable delays and custom variants. Ideal for creating dynamic typography in hero sections, landing pages, and interactive content displays.
